name: Glenwood Springs Downtown Market on 7th

Products.value: Food and food products grown or made in the region, local art, and food trucks

notes: On-file website (glenwoodspringsdda.com/market-on-7th) is confirmed the official page, run by the Glenwood Springs Downtown Development Authority (DDA); it matches the on-file Facebook handle. 2026 season runs June 23 - September 8, Tuesdays 4-8pm at 7th Street between Colorado and Cooper Ave. No phone number, SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, or market-wide certified organic status was stated on the page (one individual vendor, Fields of Glory Organic Farm, is noted as organic, but that is vendor-level, not market-level, so it was omitted). Address on file (306 7th St) was left unchanged since the site only describes the location as '7th Street between Colorado and Cooper', not a clearer street address.
